title: Super Simple Chocolate
description: This mod adds chocolate, because yes.
body:
# NOTE:
this mod has been archived because I made a mod that adds everything from this, plus more!
https://modrinth.com/mod/johnseagull-morefood

## Chocolate Mod

Minecraft is great, but you know what's missing? Chocolate of course! If you were thinking the same thing, this mod is just for you! It adds **chocolate** and **golden chocolate**.

### Crafting

To craft the standard chocolate, place 3 cocoa beans and 1 sugar anywhere in the crafting grid. To craft the golden chocolate, place a peice of chocolate in the center surrounded by 8 gold nuggets, similar to how you would craft a golden carrot. The standard chocolate restores 5 hunger points while the golden version restores 10.

_This is just a mod I made to teach myself some basic Fabric developement_
